title: Multimodal Intelligence
description: Exploring how intelligent systems can integrate visual, linguistic, emotional, and contextual signals to better understand human communication.

title: Computer Vision and Facial Analysis
description: Advancing the state of the art in visual recognition and facial analysis for a wide range of applications.

title: Large Language Models and Intelligent Systems
description: Developing and optimizing LLMs for specialized domains and creating intelligent systems that leverage natural language processing.

title: Trustworthy AI
description: Ensuring that AI systems are transparent, accountable, and fair, with a focus on human-centered design.

title: Cybersecurity and Information Security
description: Protecting digital assets and infrastructure through innovative security measures and threat detection.

title: Distributed Trust and Blockchain-Assisted Security
description: Investigating secure and decentralized approaches to strengthen data integrity, accountability, and trust in AI-enabled systems.
